arts.ttl: “Catastrophic” – Birmingham City icon mocks Aston Villa, fully disappointed by PSG showing
arts.sum: Birmingham City icon Christophe Dugarry has said he was unimpressed by Aston Villa this week, insisting their performance was a demonstration of why they are 7th in the Premier League. RMC Sport have comments from Dugarry today as the French media continue to analyse Paris Saint-Germain’s 3-1 win in the Champions League quarter finals. arts.ttl: Aston Villa's PSR fate is clear - but transfer masterclass proves one thing
arts.sum: Aston Villa have climbed to great heights in a short space of time, but they are still constrained by Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) until they can consistently generate revenues comparable to those of the ‘big six’. Villa, meanwhile, must sell players to generate funds for reinvestment in their squad.

arts.ttl: Monchi makes transfer admission as Aston Villa consider Marco Asensio and Marcus Rashford deals
arts.sum: Villa went into the window expected to do business, and while Donyell Malen and Andres Garcia were considered deals which were prudent and value for money, the signings on loan of Asensio from PSG and Rashford from Manchester United came as a result of the departures of Emiliano Buendia and Jhon Duran. Aston Villa's president of football operations Monchi has admitted that the signings of Marco Asensio and Marcus Rashford were reactive signings at the end of the January transfer window after the club sanctioned exits of a number of their existing attacking talents.

arts.ttl: 'There's going to be noise' as Aston Villa prepare for £100m rated transfer target
arts.sum: Southampton's interim boss Simon Rusk, who is preparing the squad for the visit of Villa to St Mary's this weekend, has instructed Dibling to continue enjoying his football and understands that, in the development of a young talent such as him, there'll be peaks, troughs and 'noise'. Under Russell Martin, Dibling spent time in and around the Southampton squad last season as it won promotion via the play-offs, but this year he has been far more prominent; at the time of writing, he has contributed to seven goals and made 32 appearances across all competitions.

arts.ttl: Plan to buy Aston Villa player on long-term contract – Transfer fee known, all in motion
arts.sum: Kosta Nedeljković arrived at Villa Park last summer after Aston Villa signed him from Red Star Belgrade in January 2024. He was limited to 121 minutes from five Premier League games this season. In the winter market, the right-back joined RB Leipzig on loan in search of a regular game time. arts.ttl: Football Daily | Aston Villa’s right royal Bigger Cup night at the Parc des Princes
arts.sum: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! Whether it’s Ed Sheeran at Ipswich, Michael McIntyre at Spurs or Hugh Grant and the Osman brothers at Fulham, celebrity fans always need to be on their very best behaviour, given the almost psychopathic obsession TV directors have with cutting away to them as the action on the pitch unfolds. Last night it was the turn of Prince William to find himself under constant surveillance in his VIP seat in nominative determinism’s Parc des Princes, where he and his son, George, were forced to abandon any plans they might have had to pick their noses, flick Vs at Paris Saint-Germain players or offer home fans out for a scrap on the concourse, for fear of being caught on camera and enjoying a surge in public popularity that no end of gladhanding elderly war veterans or official visits to former colonies could ever provide. This is an extract from our daily football email … Football Daily. To get the full version, just visit this page and follow the instructions. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: “Enough is enough” – Aston Villa star told he needs “psychotherapy”, not in line with reality
arts.sum: Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez needs to see a psychiatrist and learn how to control himself emotionally. That’s according to former Arsenal star Emmanuel Petit, who hasn’t held back in his criticism of the Aston Villa star in an interview with Rothen s’enflamme.
